nodes.name: Todiramphus
nodes.summary: Todiramphus（Todiramphus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联27种鸟类，如Blue-black kingfisher、Rufous-lored kingfisher、Blue-and-white kingfisher等27种鸟类。

nodes.name: Mariana kingfisher
nodes.summary: The Mariana kingfisher (Todiramphus albicilla) is a species of bird in the family Alcedinidae. It is endemic to the Northern Mariana Islands. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests and plantations. It was formerly considered a subspecies of the collared kingfisher. Subspecies T. a. owstoni (Rothschild, 1904) – northern Mariana Islands T. a. albicilla (Dumont, 1823) – southern Mariana Islands T. a. orii (Taka-Tsukasa & Momiyama, 1931) – Rota See also List of birds of the Northern Mariana Islands References Andersen, M.J.; Shult, H.T.; Cibois, A.; Thibault, J.C.; Filardi, C.E.; Moyle, R.G. (2015). "Rapid diversification and secondary sympatry in Australo-Pacific kingfishers (Aves: Alcedinidae: Todiramphus)". Royal Society Open Science. 2 (140375). Bibcode:2015RSOS....240375A. doi:10.1098/rsos.140375. hdl:1808/18198. PMC 4448819. PMID 26064600. External links
